scripts.db:reset: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const db=p.join(__dirname,'prisma','dev.db');if(fs.existsSync(db)){fs.rmSync(db);}" && prisma db push --force-reset --skip-generate && npm run db:seed
